title: Linking a Landlord to a Property

content.intro: If you own properties through a company or SPV, link the company to the property so the correct legal entity appears on agreements and records.

steps.title: Open the landlord record
steps.content: Go to Landlords and click on the company or SPV you want to link.

steps.title: Click 'Link Property'
steps.content: In the company detail view, click the 'Link Property' button.

steps.title: Select the property
steps.content: Search for and select the property from the dropdown list.

steps.title: Confirm the link
steps.content: Click 'Link' to associate the property with this company.

steps.title: Open the property
steps.content: Go to Properties and click on the property you want to assign.

steps.title: Edit the property
steps.content: Click the 'Edit' button to modify property details.

steps.title: Select landlord
steps.content: Use the Landlord dropdown to select the owning company or SPV.

steps.title: Save changes
steps.content: Click 'Save Property' to confirm the assignment.

sections.title: Multiple Properties
sections.content: A company can own multiple properties. Simply repeat the linking process for each property it owns.

sections.title: Viewing Linked Properties
sections.content: Once linked, you can see all properties owned by a company on its detail page. The properties list shows address, tenancy status, and compliance information.
